examples: Swordfish, shark, tilefish, fresh tuna steak, and king mackerel are the main culprits.
Do not eat shark, swordfish, king mackerel, or tilefish (also called white snapper), because they contain high levels of mercury.
Such as tilefish, swordfish, shark, king mackerel.
Tilefish and king mackerel are two such fish, and both were sold to consumers who believed they were procuring red snapper and halibut respectively.
Larger fish such as shark, king mackerel, swordfish, and tilefish tend to be highest in mercury because they eat smaller fish and consume the mercury in them as well.
